---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

I am a final-year Business Studies student at Dublin City University (DCU), specialising in Data Analytics, graduating in Summer 2026. I am tracking for First Class Honours based on my second and current year results.

I grew up in Ballyvaughan, Co. Clare and completed my Leaving Certificate at Coláiste Cois Life in Lucan in 2022, achieving 566 points with 7 Higher Level Honours.

## Professional Experience

### PwC Ireland — Digital Team Co-op *(June 2024 – July 2025)*

During my co-op at PwC I worked within the Digital Team, where I:

- Organised and facilitated over 10 ideation workshops on new technologies including Power Automate and Databricks
- Designed GenAI adoption workshops in collaboration with the GenAI team for ChatPwC and Copilot
- Supported the M365 migration from Google Workspace, developing SharePoint sites across the firm
- Created data visualisation assets in Power BI for the Digital Team and business stakeholders
- Developed Power Automate assets including automating the partner appraisal and monthly billing processes
- Created Visio process maps with business analysts in Kolkata to identify inefficiencies in large-scale processes
- Extended by two months to onboard and train new interns during the Tech Central restructuring

## Skills

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Technical**

- Python & NumPy
- SQL
- Power BI & Power Automate
- Microsoft Excel (advanced)
- Databricks & Workbench
- SharePoint & Visio
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Professional**

- Data Analytics
- Stakeholder Communication
- Project Management
- Process Mapping
- Critical Thinking
- Fluent Irish Speaker
:::
:::

## Goals

I am looking for a graduate role with a focus on data analytics, where I can apply the technical and interpersonal skills developed during my degree and co-op at PwC.
